95.reason: 错误：这里应该遍历到 cnt 或 sizeof(a)/4，而不是 s，s 是原始输入字符串的长度，与处理后的数组 a 的长度无关，可能导致数组越界或漏掉元素

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  错误：这里应该遍历到 cnt 或 sizeof(a)/4，而不是 s，s 是原始输入字符串的长度，与处理后的数组 a 的长度无关，可能导致数组越界或漏掉元素
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  [Uses 's' (length of original input) as loop bound, but the meaningful data in a is only up to index j-1; this copies garbage values]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Loop bound uses original string length s instead of parsed token count j, which copies uninitialized/garbage values into array d and incorrectly inflates cnt.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Incorrect loop bound; s is the length of the original string, not the number of valid elements in array a. Should use j to iterate only over parsed data.

26.reason: [b is not null-terminated after removing spaces; strlen(b) results in undefined behavior]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  [b is not null-terminated after removing spaces; strlen(b) results in undefined behavior]

82.code: for(int i=0;i<=sizeof(a)/4;i++)//先算乘除，后算加减
82.reason: [Loop bound is incorrect; sizeof(a)/4 iterates over the entire array including uninitialized elements and causes out-of-bounds access when i equals 10000. Should iterate up to j, the actual number of parsed tokens.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  [Loop bound i<=10000 leads to access a[10000] which is out-of-bounds; also a[i+1] when i=9999 is out-of-bounds]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Loop bound is incorrect; sizeof(a)/4 iterates over the entire array including uninitialized elements and causes out-of-bounds access when i equals 10000. Should iterate up to j, the actual number of parsed tokens.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Loop bound iterates over uninitialized array elements and uses <= causing out-of-bounds access. Should iterate up to j (number of parsed elements) with <.

86.reason: [When i=0, a[i-1] accesses a[-1] (invalid); also out-of-bounds for a[i+1] at i=9999]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  [When i=0, a[i-1] accesses a[-1] (invalid); also out-of-bounds for a[i+1] at i=9999]
0.14285714285714285 , reason:  [Same issue with a[i-1] when i=0]

11.reason: The gets() function is deprecated and removed in C11, causing a compilation error in strict compilers. Use fgets() instead.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  The gets() function is deprecated and removed in C11, causing a compilation error in strict compilers. Use fgets() instead.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  gets() is deprecated and removed in the C11 standard, causing a compilation error in modern environments. Use fgets() instead.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Using `gets` is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard since C11; many modern compilers reject it, causing a compilation error.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Using 'gets' is unsafe and deprecated; it was removed in C11 and causes compilation errors with modern compilers. Use 'fgets' instead.]
